message:
feat(engine): add spread operator, promise, and generator runtime support

- ArrayPush, SpreadIntoArray, SpreadIntoObject IR3 instruction handlers
- IR2->IR3 lowering for array/object spread operations
- Mnemonic strings for new instructions in orchestrator

Part of RC-1.4 (generators), RC-1.12 (spread), RC-2.1 (promise) beads.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
